title: Classic Guacamole Avocado

seo.title: Classic Guacamole Recipe: Easy & Authentic Mexican Dip
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make the best classic guacamole recipe at home! This easy, authentic Mexican avocado dip is perfect for parties and snacks. Get the simple step-by-step guide.
seo.h1: Classic Guacamole Recipe: The Best Authentic Avocado Dip
h2Headings: Tips for the Perfect Classic Guacamole
seo.imageAlt: A vibrant bowl of classic guacamole recipe with fresh avocado, cilantro, and lime, served with tortilla chips.
seo.imageCaption: Whip up this easy and authentic classic guacamole recipe for your next gathering!

description: Experience the vibrant flavors of Mexico with this classic guacamole recipe, a timeless appetizer perfect for any occasion. Creamy Hass avocados are mashed with fresh lime juice, zesty onion, fiery serrano pepper, and fragrant cilantro, creating an irresistible dip. This authentic preparation brings the true taste of Mexican tradition right to your table, ready to be enjoyed with your favorite tortilla chips.

ingredients.notes: halved, pitted, and flesh scooped out
finely minced, seeds removed for less heat (optional)

instructions.title: Prepare the Avocados
instructions.text: Carefully halve the ripe Hass avocados lengthwise, remove the pits, and scoop the creamy flesh into a medium-sized mixing bowl. Discard the pits and skins.

instructions.title: Mash the Avocado Flesh
instructions.text: Using a fork or a potato masher, gently mash the avocado flesh to your desired consistency. Some prefer it chunky, while others like it smoother. Be careful not to overmash.

instructions.title: Incorporate Fresh Aromatics
instructions.text: Add the finely diced red onion, finely chopped fresh cilantro, and minced serrano pepper to the mashed avocado. Sprinkle in the kosher salt.

instructions.title: Add the Zesty Lime Juice
instructions.text: Squeeze the fresh lime juice directly over the avocado mixture. The lime juice not only adds a bright, tangy flavor but also helps to prevent the guacamole from browning.

instructions.title: Gently Mix and Season
instructions.text: Gently fold all the ingredients together until well combined. Taste the guacamole and adjust the seasoning as needed, adding more salt, lime juice, or serrano pepper to your preference.

instructions.title: Serve Immediately
instructions.text: Transfer the classic guacamole to a serving bowl. For an extra touch, you can garnish with a sprinkle of fresh cilantro, a thin slice of lime, or a few whole serrano slices. Serve immediately with warm tortilla chips, fresh crudités, or as a side to your favorite Mexican dishes.

tips: To achieve the perfect texture, use a molcajete (mortar and pestle) if available, as it gently bruises the ingredients, releasing their full flavor and creating an authentic rustic consistency.
Always use ripe Hass avocados; they offer the creamiest texture and richest flavor. If you prefer a milder heat, substitute jalapeño for serrano pepper, or omit the chili entirely.
To prevent browning, place a piece of plastic wrap directly on the surface of the guacamole, pressing out any air, before refrigerating. Serve chilled for the best flavor.
article: Classic Guacamole Avocado is a beloved Mexican Appetizers dish enjoyed across Mexican. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
